issues.title: Unused variable with unwrap_or_default
issues.detail: Multiple instances of `let body: Value = resp.json().await.unwrap_or_default()` where body is never used. Pattern appears 6 times (lines 671, 1217, 1235, 1479, 1499, 1517). While unwrap_or_default is not critical here (returns empty Value on deserialization failure), it masks potential deserialization errors silently.

issues.title: Future Rust incompatibilities
issues.detail: Dependencies redis v0.24.0 and sqlx-postgres v0.7.4 contain code that will be rejected by a future Rust version. Should upgrade these crates in next iteration.

issues.title: Module import error prevents test execution
issues.detail: Package subpath './ml-dsa' is not defined by "exports" in @noble/post-quantum/package.json. The spec imports `ml_dsa65` from '@noble/post-quantum/ml-dsa' at line 28, but the package does not expose this subpath. This is a dependency configuration issue, not a test failure.

issues.title: No tests found
issues.detail: Due to the import error, Playwright could not load the spec file and therefore found zero tests to run. The test suite never reached execution.

issues.title: Status state mismatch
issues.detail: Expected status to be 'locked' (terminal confirmed state) or 'pending' (awaiting L1 confirmation). Got 'pending', which is acceptable but not the strongly preferred terminal state 'locked'. If this lock was created >5 minutes ago, investigate why it hasn't reached terminal confirmation.

issues.title: RPC Connection Timeout
issues.detail: The L1 RPC endpoint (rpc.sepolia.org) did not respond within the connection timeout window. This is an infrastructure issue, not a contract or code regression. Cloudflare returned HTTP 522 indicating the origin server was unreachable.
